name: yonxao-mindmap
description: Obsidian plugin for rendering Markdown topic-level mind maps from yxmm code blocks.

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build && npm run build:check
scripts.dev:prepare: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.mjs && node scripts/prepare-obsidian-dev.mjs
scripts.release:prepare: npm run clean && npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.mjs && npm run release:body
scripts.release:verify: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run release:prepare && npm run build:check

author: yonxao
